nodes.name: Sporophila
nodes.summary: Sporophila（Sporophila）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联36种鸟类，如Lined seedeater、White-bellied seedeater、Parrot-billed seedeater等36种鸟类。

nodes.name: Drab seedeater
nodes.summary: The drab seedeater (Sporophila simplex) is a species of bird in the family Thraupidae. It is found in Ecuador and Peru. Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical dry shrubland, subtropical or tropical moist shrubland, and subtropical or tropical high-altitude shrubland. References
nodes.shortSummary: The drab seedeater (Sporophila simplex) is a species of bird in the family Thraupidae. It is found in Ecuador and Peru.
